project.title: Contract & E-Signature Service
project.description: Enterprise contract-signing API: prepare a contract, route it to signers, capture each signature, and store a tamper-evident final artifact.

flow.title: Contract Signing Flow
flow.description: A drafted contract is dispatched to one or more signers; each signature is captured with audit metadata; once everyone has signed, the system seals the final document and stores it.

domains.name: Identity & Access
domains.description: Authenticates owners and signers (a signer may not be a registered user).

domains.name: Contract Lifecycle
domains.description: Creating, routing, signing and sealing contracts.

domains.name: Storage & Audit
domains.description: Persists artefacts and the audit trail.

steps.title: Create Contract
steps.description: Owner uploads a contract template, defines the signing fields and the list of signers.

steps.title: Dispatch Service
steps.description: Issues a one-time signed link per signer and emails it. Each link grants scoped access to that signer's fields only.

steps.title: Signer Portal
steps.description: Signer opens the link; identity is verified via the token (optionally a second factor).

steps.title: Signature Capture
steps.description: Captures the signature, timestamp, IP and user-agent, and records an audit event.

steps.title: Completion Checker
steps.description: Watches for the last required signature. Once everyone has signed, hands off to the sealer.

steps.title: Seal Worker
steps.description: Composes a final PDF with all signatures and the audit log, hashes it and stores the hash for tamper detection.

steps.title: Blob Store
steps.description: Object storage for the final signed PDF.

steps.title: Audit Store
steps.description: Append-only log of every signer interaction (open, decline, sign).

steps.title: Contract Store
steps.description: Indexed metadata about the contract: owner, signers, status, hash. Powers list/search APIs.
